assessments.label: Q1 2026 Baseline Assessment
assessments.notes: First formal maturity assessment. Baseline established for all five ICT capabilities. Focus areas identified for Q2 improvement plan.

capNotes.vulnerability_mgmt: Ad-hoc scanning in place but no formal remediation SLA. Patching is reactive.
capNotes.performance_capacity: Basic monitoring exists but no capacity planning process. Thresholds not defined.
capNotes.incident_mgmt: ServiceDesk in place. Incidents logged and categorised. SLAs defined but not consistently met.
capNotes.change_mgmt: CAB exists and meets weekly. Change success rate not formally tracked yet.
capNotes.disaster_recovery: DRP document exists but is outdated. No DR test has been performed in 18 months.
